message:
test(ftui-extras): improve doom/bsp.rs test coverage (bd-3iynj)

Added 9 new tests (28→37 total) covering:
- bbox_visible: zero FOV, viewer on edge not inside, large coordinates
- bsp_traverse: all-return-false early exit, viewer very far/very close,
  negative partition origin, reversed partition direction,
  deep tree with 8 subsectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
